data.title: Solar A/S: No. 5 2026 Course of annual general meeting
data.description: During the annual general meeting (AGM), the management's review was acknowledged, and the Annual Report 2025 was discussed and approved by the attendees. The statement given by the Executive Board and the Board of Directors, along with the independent auditors' report, was also reviewed. This important gathering highlighted key financial figures and decisions, affirming the company's direction for the upcoming year.

data.title: Lotus Tech Becomes the Second Automaker to Obtain UN R171 Certification Globally, Advancing ADAS Compliance
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Lotus Technology Inc., a prominent intelligent and luxury mobility provider, disclosed its certification under UN Regulation No. 171, 01 Series (UN R171.01) from the United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE). Trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol LOT, the company is now the second automaker worldwide to receive this certification, solidifying its status in the industry.

data.title: Kratos, Airbus Preparing Two Valkyries for First Flight with European Mission System
data.description: A collaborative team is making steady advancements in developing an Integrated Uncrewed Collaborative Combat Aircraft (UCCA) system for the German Air Force. The joint effort is focused on creating a sophisticated unmanned aircraft that can operate in a collaborative combat environment. The team is working towards completing the system, which is set to provide the German Air Force with a cutting-edge capability. This development is a part of ongoing efforts to enhance the Air Force's technological capabilities and strengthen national defense. The project marks a significant milestone in the military's pursuit of innovative unmanned aircraft solutions.

data.title: XORTX Reports that Independent Proxy Advisory Firms Recommend XORTX Shareholders Vote “For” the Share Consolidation
data.description: XORTX Therapeutics Inc., a pharmaceutical company specializing in treatments for gout and progressive kidney disease, received positive recommendations from independent proxy advisory firms, such as Institutional Shareholder Services, to vote in favor of the share consolidation at their upcoming shareholder meeting on March 24, 2026. XORTX is listed on NASDAQ as XRTX, TSXV as XRTX, and Frankfurt as ANU. The meeting is crucial for shareholders as they consider the company's proposed restructuring plan.

data.title: G-III Apparel Group Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Today, on March 13, 2026, G-III Apparel Group, Ltd. (NASDAQ: GIII) revealed its latest financial move - the declaration of a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share by its Board of Directors. This dividend will be paid out on March 30, 2026, to all stockholders recorded on March 23, 2026.

data.title: StorageVault Announces Quarterly Dividend for Q1 2026
data.description: On March 13, 2026, StorageVault Canada Inc. (SVI-TSX) disclosed a quarterly dividend of $0.003006 per Common Share, scheduled for payment on April 15, 2026. Shareholders as of March 31, 2026, will receive the dividend, with an ex-dividend date of the same day. This dividend is classified as an "eligible dividend" for Canadian income tax objectives.

data.title: DCT now part of Akamai Partner Connect Program, strengthening collaboration in digital technologies.
data.description: The latest report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has significantly decreased to 4.2%, marking a 0.5% drop from the previous month. This positive trend indicates that the economy is steadily recovering from the impact of the pandemic. Additionally, it was reported that 300,000 new jobs were created last month, surpassing economists' expectations. This increase in employment opportunities is a promising sign for job seekers and the overall labor market. The surge in job creation has primarily been observed in the manufacturing and service sectors, indicating growth and stability in these industries. Experts are optimistic about the future trajectory of the economy, with projections suggesting continued job growth and a further decline in the unemployment rate in the coming months.

data.title: Trade in Your Vehicle With Confidence at We Auto in Baton Rouge, LA
data.description: In Baton Rouge, Louisiana, on March 13, 2026, We Auto offers drivers the opportunity to trade in their current vehicles and receive a competitive value. This value can then be used towards the purchase of another vehicle from the dealership's inventory. This offer is open for individuals seeking to upgrade their vehicles.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise As Oil Prices Retreat; Dell, Micron Lead 7 Stocks To Watch
data.description: The recent increase in oil prices led to the major stock indexes experiencing a significant drop. This surge resulted in oil prices closing at their highest level since 2022. Stocks worth keeping an eye on include Dell and Micron. Dow Jones futures are on the rise as oil prices start to retreat, with Dell and Micron being two of the seven top stocks to monitor.

data.title: Earnings Scheduled For March 13, 2026
data.description: Several companies are set to report earnings before the bell today. Douglas Elliman (NYSE: DOUG) and Acurx Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: ACXP) will be reporting their fourth-quarter earnings. Waldencast (NASDAQ: WALD) is expected to report a quarterly loss of $0.41 per share with revenue reaching $286.02 million. Buckle (NYSE: BKE) is projected to report earnings of $1.51 per share on revenue of $396.45 million. Emerald Holding (NYSE: EEX) is expected to report earnings of $0.04 per share on revenue of $131.00 million. Full details can be found on Benzinga.com.
